script_text: Great readers read smoothly, like talking.
Fluency is reading accurately, at the right speed, with expression.
Accuracy means reading the words correctly.
If you get stuck, slow down and sound it out.
Rate is how fast. Not too fast, not too slow.
Expression means using your voice to match the story.
Pretend you are telling the story to a friend. Use your normal voice!
Now you are ready to read with flow!
